creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Also add graphics/cairo (see PR 201588) to the list of ports that won't build because of the undefined reference issue with driver 367.27:

[...]
cc: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2'
/usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glcore.so.1: undefined reference to `nv_vasprintf_alloc'
/usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glcore.so.1: undefined reference to `nv_vasprintf_free'
/usr/local/lib/libnvidia-glcore.so.1: undefined reference to `nv_vasprintf_vsnprintf'
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
*** [cairo-sphinx] Error code 1

make[6]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/cairo/work/cairo-1.14.6/util/cairo-sphinx
